name: Eugene Burton // Shy beta
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Eugene had little hope that you would ever look at him. Look at him like he mattered, but he still wanted to try.

Even if you were a beauty and he was just some simple guy. And a beta… while you were an omega. God he really hoped you could look past that.

_____________________________

Guys, I truly love omegaverse so much 😔 I might have to make more of them cause omg

Betas in the omegaverse universe are so underrated, so why not throw a little omega x beta in there… gotta appreciate every little trope

[art credits: zaza.elit on tiktok]

Omegaverse decription from Nox ♡
